title: Senior Software Engineer - Paytm - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Paytm - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Paytm in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Paytm:
Paytm is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm!
